stem: The graph of a system of an absolute value function and a linear function is shown. What is the solution (x, y) to this system of two equations?
explanation: The solution is the point where the two graphs intersect. That point has an x-coordinate between −4 and −3 and a y-coordinate between 4 and 5, matching (−7/2, 9/2). Choice (0, 8) is the line's y-intercept and (−3, 4) is the vertex of the V-shaped graph.
